summary: Tested the new Quotes -> Orders -> Invoices module (backend API via pytest, 18/18 passing, plus full Playwright UI walkthrough). Verified quote creation, line items, pricing calculation, send/approve/decline, idempotent convert-to-order, 409 locking on converted/declined quotes, zero-line-item approval rejection, direct-order path, Orders Financial tab (Source Quote display, Generate Invoice, no more Generate Quote Draft), Orders Production tab (Generate Work Order Draft still present), global Invoices workspace, partial+full payment recording, invoice status dropdown restrictions, sequential numbering, and regression of Customers/Order Items/DocuLink/Dashboard.

ui_bugs.issue: Toast message still says 'Invoice draft {number} generated' even though this now creates a first-class Invoice (not the old invoice_drafts). Purely cosmetic wording leftover from the old flow.

action_items: Optional: update the generateInvoiceDraft toast text in OrdersWorkspace.js from 'Invoice draft ... generated' to 'Invoice ... generated' for wording consistency with the new first-class invoice model.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend quotes/invoices/orders routes and repositories look clean: proper 409/404 error mapping, atomic sequence counter (findOneAndUpdate $inc) correctly avoids the count-then-insert race condition, LOCKED_QUOTE_STATUSES / LOCKED_INVOICE_STATUSES enforced consistently across update/add/delete paths.
convert_to_order is properly idempotent via converted_order_id short-circuit check before re-validating status == approved.

InvoicePatch model correctly excludes 'paid'/'partially_paid' from the Literal type, so PUT with status=paid correctly returns 422 (verified) - this satisfies the 'cannot manually set to paid' requirement even though it's a 422 rather than 409.
No _id leakage observed in any API responses (all repositories project {'_id': 0}).
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_-prefixed quotes/orders/invoices via both pytest and Playwright UI runs (e.g. QUO-0016/0017, ORD-0013/0014, INV-0006). Not cleaned up - left in place per instructions since fresh DB already contained prior self-test data from main agent (QUO-000X etc.) which was expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full Quote->Order->Invoice lifecycle verified end-to-end at both API and UI layers: quote create/add-item/calculate-pricing/send/approve(with approval panel + fields)/convert-to-order(idempotent, verified via UI clicking convert twice is not needed since backend idempotency already covered by pytest)/decline+409 locks/zero-item-approval-409; Direct Order (no quote) creation works and Financial tab correctly shows 'Direct Order'; Orders Financial tab shows Source Quote + Open Quote button + Generate Invoice (Generate Quote Draft confirmed removed, returns 404); Production tab Generate Work Order Draft still works; global Invoices workspace lists invoice, partial payment -> Partially Paid, full payment -> Paid $0 balance, status dropdown correctly disables partially_paid/paid options; Customers/DocuLink(entity_type=quote,invoice)/Dashboard load fine with no console errors. Only issue found is a cosmetic toast wording ('Invoice draft' instead of 'Invoice') which is non-blocking.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no blocking bugs found; only a minor cosmetic text leftover from prior 'invoice_drafts' implementation in the toast copy inside generateInvoiceDraft() in OrdersWorkspace.js.
